description.from: Dispels harmful effects from the ally with the lowest current HP and restores HP 529*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+330.6% ATK 3times, and when healing the target, nearby allies are additionally healed for 40% of the healing amount.
description.to: Dispels negative effects from the ally with the lowest HP, healing HP of the target by ??? and HP of allies nearby equal to 40% of Heal Rate.

description.from: Grants all allies a shield that absorbs 2080*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 800.6% of ATK damage for 4sec. While the shield is active, Healing Power is increased by 120% and Status Resistance is increased by 800.
description.to: Casts a shield on all allies that absorbs ??? DMG for 12 sec. While the shield is in effect, the target increases its ATK by 20%, Heal Rate by 50% and gains immunity to CC.

description.from: Deals 177*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 110.8% of ATK Magic DMG to the target and nearby enemies 6times, then inflicts Blind for 2sec. This skill is applied with an increased Critical Rate of 800.
description.to: Attacks the target and its nearby enemies 6 times, dealing up to ??? M.DMG. 500 additional Crit Chance applies to this Skill. Hit targets will be blinded for 6 sec, and take 25% increased All DMG for 10 sec.

description.from: Every 20sec, restores 14% of Max HP to the 2 allies with the lowest current HP, and increases their Magic DEF by 60*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) for 15sec.
description.to: Reduces All DMG taken by 15%. At the beginning of each battle, and every 15 sec, increases M.DEF of 1 ally with the lowest HP by ??? for 10 sec and heals HP of the target by 15% for the duration of Skill.

light.from: Mana cost increases by 1000, but the target count changes to 2.
light.to: In exchange for 1 additional Mana Cost, the skill targets 2 allies.

dark.from: Healed allies take 40% less Magic DMG for 10 sec.
dark.to: Healed allies take 25% reduced M.DMG for 10 sec.

light.from: Increases the target’s Physical DMG taken by 10% for 10 sec.
light.to: In exchange for 1 additional Mana Cost, DMG is increased by 80%.

dark.from: Increases the target’s Magic DMG taken by 10% for 10 sec.
dark.to: Changes the target to random enemies.

light.from: Activates [Goddess Grace] additionally at the start of every battle.
light.to: Reduces DMG the target takes from Non-Hero enemies by 30% for the duration of Skill.

dark.from: Magic DMG taken by Frey is reduced by 20%.

description.from: [Blessings of Light] Increases the shield amount by 50% and recovers {0} Mana every sec for 4 sec.
description.to: [Blessings of Light] Increases shield amount by 50% and recovers {0} Mana every second for 4 sec.

description.from: [Heaven’s Vengeance] increases the target’s M.DMG taken by 20% for 10 sec and extends Blind duration by {0} sec.
description.to: [Heaven's Vengeance] Target takes 20% increased M.DMG for 10 sec, and Blind duration is increased by {0} sec.

description.from: Every 8 sec, heals the 4 allies with the lowest current HP by {0}% of ATK, and increases the Critical Rate of the 4 allies with the highest ATK by 200, and Critical DMG by {1}% for 8 sec.
description.to: Every 8 sec, heals 4 allies with the lowest HP by {0}% of own ATK, and increases Crit Chance by 300 and Crit DMG by {1}% for the ally with the highest ATK for 8 sec.
